message: Node started: Identify the smallest prime p such that the congruence n^4 + 1 = 0 (mod p) has a solution. For each candidate p, check if the condition n^4 + 1 = 0 (mod p^2) is satisfied for any n. Note that for x^4 + 1 = 0 (mod p) to have a solution, p must be 1 (mod 8) or p = 2. Test primes in increasing order: 2, 17, 41, 73, 89, 97, etc.
